code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  mut found = false
  mut fi = 0
  mut fj = 0
  mut a = 0
  while a < nums.len()
    mut b = a + 1
    while b < nums.len()
      if not found
        let xa = match nums.get(a)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        let xb = match nums.get(b)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        if xa + xb == target
          found = true
          fi = a
          fj = b
        end
      end
      b = b + 1
    end
    a = a + 1
  end

  if found
    print("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
  else
    print("none")
  end
  Ok(())
end
